title: janantos.tngl.sh/brow6el
excerpt: A full-featured web browser for the terminal using Chromium (CEF) with support for Sixel and Kitty graphics protocols.
content_html:
README.md

This reporitory [https://tangled.org/janantos.tngl.sh/brow6el] is now the main and only source of truth, previous on Codeberg [https://codeberg.org/janantos/brow6el] is kept for referrence only. I have decided to migrated from Codeberg because of my other projects are not welcomed there anymore and I want to keep my projects together on single platform.

Brow6el - Terminal Web Browser with Graphics Support#

A full-featured web browser for the terminal using Chromium (CEF) with support for Sixel and Kitty graphics protocols.

WARNING: Kitty image support (currently only in main branch builds) by its design nature is barelly usable in SSH when brow6el runs on remote host, this feature is usable when brow6el is executed on localhost. On ssh the responsivenes of browser is significantly affected, due to massive data transfers on each frame rendered

WARNING: Kitty image support (currently only in main branch builds), Ubuntu 24.04 is shipped with very old Kitty version 0.32.2 which does not handle newer image protocol brow6el is using as BASE64 data are being printed instead rendered screen. however foot terminal works on Ubuntu perfectly fine

WARNING: this is POC code quality. Build process tested in Ubuntu 25.10, Debian 13, Arch Linux. The browser itself was tested in foot terminal, wezterm, kitty, ghostty, yaft framebuffer terminal and Windows 11 Terminal with sixel support using WSL2.

Screenshots#

Demo#

Page view#

JavaScript console#

Features#

  • Graphics Protocols - Supports both Sixel and Kitty graphics protocols with automatic detection
  • Tiled Rendering - Optional tile-based Sixel rendering for improved responsiveness (Sixel only)
  • Mouse Support - Click, scroll, and interact with web pages
  • Vim-Style Modal Control - Efficient keyboard navigation with three modes (STANDARD, INSERT, MOUSE, VISUAL)
  • Grid Jump Mode - Fast mouse positioning with recursive grid navigation (3-4 keystrokes to almost any element)
  • Element Inspector - Browser DevTools-like element inspection in MOUSE mode
  • JavaScript Console - Execute JS commands and view console logs
  • Bookmarks - Save and organize your favorite pages
  • User Scripts - Inject custom JavaScript into pages
  • Download Manager - Save files with progress tracking
  • Popup Handling - Terminal-friendly popup dialogs
  • Multi-Instance - Run multiple browser windows simultaneously
  • Configurable Profiles - Choose between temporary (private) or persistent (normal) browsing
  • DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH) - Secure DNS with configurable providers and modes
  • Modern Web - Full HTML5/CSS3/JavaScript support via Chromium

Vim-Style Modal Control#

Brow6el uses a vim-inspired modal keyboard interface with three modes. The current mode is always shown in the status bar (e.g., [S][T] for Standard mode with Tiled rendering).

STANDARD Mode [S] - Default#

Vim-like navigation with single-key commands (no Ctrl required):

Navigation:

  • h/j/k/l or arrow keys - Navigate (left/down/up/right)
  • t/g - Scroll up/down
  • p/n - Back/forward in history

Actions:

  • r - Reload page
  • u - Navigate to URL
  • U - Copy current URL to clipboard (Shift+U)
  • c - Toggle JavaScript console
  • d - Add bookmark
  • b - Open bookmarks
  • f - Hint mode (keyboard link navigation)
  • s - User scripts menu
  • y - Toggle auto-inject user scripts
  • z - Toggle tiled rendering (Sixel only, reduces flicker)
  • Z - Force full redraw (Sixel: monolithic render, Kitty: full refresh)
  • m - Open downloads manager
  • x - Exit browser

Zoom Controls:

  • + or = - Zoom in
  • - or _ - Zoom out
  • 0 - Reset zoom to 1.0x

Mode Switch:

  • i - Enter INSERT mode
  • e - Enter MOUSE mode
  • v - Enter VISUAL mode (text selection)

INSERT Mode [I]#

All keypresses pass through to the webpage. Use for typing in forms, text areas, etc.

Exit: ESC - Return to STANDARD mode

VISUAL Mode [V]#

Text selection mode for copying page content. The caret starts at the first visible text, or if coming from MOUSE mode, at the mouse cursor position.

Caret Positioning (initial):

  • h - Move cursor left by character
  • l - Move cursor right by character
  • w - Move cursor forward by word
  • b - Move cursor backward by word
  • j - Move cursor down by line
  • k - Move cursor up by line
  • v - Start selecting from current position

Selection (after pressing v):

  • h - Extend selection left by character
  • l - Extend selection right by character
  • w - Extend selection forward by word
  • b - Extend selection backward by word
  • j - Extend selection down by line
  • k - Extend selection up by line

Actions:

  • y - Copy selection to clipboard, exit VISUAL mode
  • ESC - Cancel selection, exit VISUAL mode

Tip: Use MOUSE mode (e) to position cursor, then press ESC and v to start text selection at that exact position!

MOUSE Mode [M]#

Keyboard-driven mouse emulation with visual cursor:

Movement:

  • h/j/k/l or arrow keys - Move mouse (left/down/up/right)
  • q/f - Toggle precision/fast speed
  • r - Toggle drag-and-drop
  • g - Toggle grid jump mode (fast navigation)

Actions:

  • SPACE or ENTER - Click at cursor position or drop
  • i - Toggle inspect mode (show element info on hover)
  • r - Drop when drag-and-drop is active

Exit: e or ESC - Return to STANDARD mode

Grid Jump Mode#

Fast mouse positioning using keyboard-driven grid navigation. Press g in MOUSE mode to activate:

  • Adaptive Grid Overlay - A 3x3 grid with labeled cells appears (default keys: qweasdzxc)
  • Quick Jump - Press a key (q/w/e/a/s/d/z/x/c) to jump to that grid cell
  • Recursive Zoom - Automatically shows sub-grid in selected cell for precision
  • Visual Feedback - Green grid indicates more zoom levels available, red indicates maximum zoom
  • Auto-Precision_movement - At maximum zoom, grid switches to cursor movement mode with high precision
  • Navigation - Backspace to zoom out, ESC to exit grid mode
  • Configurable Keys - Customize grid keys in ~/.brow6el/browser.conf (grid_keys setting)

Grid mode enables precise element selection with just 3-4 keystrokes, combining speed with accuracy.

Inspect Mode#

While in MOUSE mode, press i to toggle inspect mode. This feature works similar to browser DevTools inspector:

  • Element Highlighting - Cyan border around the element under cursor
  • Info Panel - Shows element details including:
    • Tag name, ID, and classes
    • Key attributes (href, src, type, name, etc.)
    • Dimensions and position
    • Text content preview
  • Real-time Updates - Info updates as you move the cursor
  • Toggle Off - Press i again to exit inspect mode

This is useful for debugging web pages, understanding page structure, or finding specific elements.

Smart Mode Switching#

The browser automatically switches modes based on context:

  • Clicking an input field in MOUSE mode → Auto-switch to INSERT mode
  • Clicking a select box in MOUSE mode → Auto-switch to STANDARD mode
  • Page navigation → Auto-reset to STANDARD mode

Advanced Navigation Modes#

Hint Mode (f key)#

Press f to show yellow hint labels on all links. Type the hint label (e.g., "a", "ab") and press Enter to navigate. This provides keyboard-only navigation without needing a mouse. Press ESC or f again to exit.

Mouse Emulation Mode (e key)#

Press e to activate a yellow mouse cursor overlay. Use hjkl or arrow keys to move it around the page and press SPACE/Enter to click at that position. q toggles precision mode, f toggles fast mode. Press i to toggle inspect mode which shows detailed element information as you hover. This works on all elements including iframes and consent dialogs. Press ESC or e again to exit.

Quick Start#

# 1. Download CEF binary (~670MB, one-time)
./download_cef.sh 

# 2. Build
./build.sh

# 3. Run
./build/run_brow6el.sh https://example.com

# Multiple instances supported!
# Open additional terminals and run more instances

Examples#

The examples/ directory contains:

  • userscripts/ - Example user scripts (dark mode, Google customization, etc.)

See examples/README.md for details.

Advanced Features#

Bookmarks#

  • Press d (in STANDARD mode) to bookmark the current page
  • Press b (in STANDARD mode) to view and manage bookmarks
  • Navigate with ↑/↓ or j/k, press Enter to open, 'd' to delete
  • Bookmarks stored in ~/.brow6el/bookmarks

User Scripts#

Custom JavaScript injection system similar to Greasemonkey/Tampermonkey.

Quick Start:

  1. Create script directory: mkdir -p ~/.brow6el/userscripts
  2. Add .js files to the directory
  3. Configure URL patterns in ~/.brow6el/userscripts.conf
  4. Press s to manually inject or y to toggle auto-inject

Example config (~/.brow6el/userscripts.conf):

auto_inject=true

dark-mode.js|Dark Mode|true|*
google-custom.js|Google Custom|true|*google.com*,*google.co.*

See USERSCRIPTS.md for detailed documentation.

Bundled Scripts: The browser comes with several pre-installed scripts in the scripts/ directory:

  • view-source.js - View HTML source code with syntax highlighting, formatting, and line numbers (keyboard navigable)
  • reader-mode.js - Simplifies pages to just article content (like Firefox Reader View)
  • adblock.js - Basic ad blocking functionality
  • force-light-mode.js - Forces light color scheme on all pages
  • frameset-redirect.js - Redirects from frameset pages to actual content

To use bundled scripts, add them to your ~/.brow6el/userscripts.conf:

view-source.js|View Page Source|true|*

Then press s to open the user scripts menu and select "View Page Source", or enable auto-inject and press the script's trigger key.

Profile Modes#

Brow6el supports different profile modes for different use cases:

Temporary Mode (Default):

  • Each session uses a new profile
  • All data (cookies, cache, history) deleted on exit
  • Perfect for private browsing
  • No data persists between sessions

Persistent Mode:

  • Profile saved in ~/.brow6el/profile
  • Cookies and login sessions maintained
  • Cache speeds up repeated visits
  • Works like a normal browser

Configuration (~/.brow6el/browser.conf):

# Choose profile mode: temporary, persistent, or custom
profile_mode=temporary

# Custom profile location (when mode=custom)
profile_path=~/.brow6el/profile

# Cache settings
cache_size_mb=500
clear_cache_on_exit=false

# Privacy options (for persistent/custom)
clear_cookies_on_exit=false

# Default homepage URL
default_url=https://example.com

# Grid keys for mouse emulation grid jump (must be exactly 9 characters)
# Default: qweasdzxc (3x3 grid matching keyboard layout)
# Alternative: abcdefghi (alphabetical)
grid_keys=qweasdzxc

# Graphics Protocol Selection
# Choose graphics protocol: auto, sixel, or kitty
# auto: Detect terminal capabilities (default)
# sixel: Force Sixel protocol (recommended, faster)
# kitty: Force Kitty graphics protocol
graphics_protocol=auto

# DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH) Configuration
# Enable secure DNS to encrypt DNS queries
doh_enabled=false
doh_server=https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query
doh_mode=secure
# DoH mode options:
#   secure: Mandatory DoH, no fallback (recommended for blocking)
#   automatic: Use DoH when available, fallback to system DNS
#   off: Disable DoH
# Popular DoH servers:
#   Cloudflare: https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query
#   Google: https://dns.google/dns-query
#   Quad9: https://dns.quad9.net/dns-query

# Tiled Rendering (Sixel only)
# Enable tile-based sixel rendering (reduces flicker on updates)
# When enabled, only changed screen regions are redrawn
# When disabled, the entire screen is redrawn on every update
# Note: Kitty protocol always uses monolithic rendering
tiled_rendering=true

# Terminal Cell Dimensions (optional override)
# Leave at 0 for auto-detection (recommended)
# Only override if auto-detection produces incorrect results
#cell_width=0
#cell_height=0

# Zoom settings
# Default zoom level (1.0 = no zoom, 2.0 = 2x zoom)
zoom_level=2.5
# Zoom step size for +/- keyboard shortcuts
zoom_step=0.25
# Default zoom behavior: auto, fixed, or none
# auto: Automatically adjust zoom based on terminal DPI and window size
# fixed: Use fixed zoom level from zoom_level setting
# none: No automatic zoom (start at 1.0x, manual control only)
default_zoom_behavior=fixed

# Proxy Configuration
# Route browser traffic through HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS proxy
proxy_enabled=false
proxy_server=
proxy_username=
proxy_password=
proxy_bypass_list=localhost,127.0.0.1

Examples:

  • Private browsing: profile_mode=temporary (default)
  • Normal browsing: profile_mode=persistent
  • Multiple profiles: profile_mode=custom with different paths
  • Semi-private: persistent with clear_cookies_on_exit=true
  • Secure DNS with blocking: doh_enabled=true with doh_mode=secure
  • HTTP proxy with auth: proxy_enabled=true, proxy_server=http://proxy.local:8080, proxy_username=user

DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH)#

Brow6el supports DNS-over-HTTPS to encrypt DNS queries and prevent DNS-based tracking or blocking.

Configuration (~/.brow6el/browser.conf):

doh_enabled=true
doh_server=https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query
doh_mode=secure

DoH Modes:

  • secure - Mandatory DoH with no fallback to system DNS (recommended for ad-blocking/privacy)
  • automatic - Attempts DoH first, falls back to system DNS on failure
  • off - Disables DoH

Popular DoH Providers:

  • Cloudflare: https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query (fast, privacy-focused)
  • Google: https://dns.google/dns-query (reliable, global)
  • Quad9: https://dns.quad9.net/dns-query (security-focused, blocks malicious domains)

Note: When using secure mode, ensure your DoH server resolves google.com (used by CEF for connectivity checks) or allows all domains, otherwise DoH may fail to initialize.

Proxy Configuration#

Brow6el supports routing browser traffic through HTTP, HTTPS, and SOCKS proxies with optional authentication.

Configuration (~/.brow6el/browser.conf):

# Enable proxy
proxy_enabled=true

# Proxy server (format: scheme://host:port - NO credentials in URL)
# Supported: http://, https://, socks4://, socks5://
proxy_server=http://127.0.0.1:8080

# Proxy authentication (optional)
# Leave empty if proxy doesn't require authentication
proxy_username=myuser
proxy_password=mypass

# Bypass proxy for these hosts (comma-separated)
proxy_bypass_list=localhost,127.0.0.1,*.local

Proxy Schemes:

  • http:// - HTTP proxy
  • https:// - HTTPS proxy (connects to proxy via HTTPS)
  • socks4:// - SOCKS v4 proxy
  • socks5:// - SOCKS v5 proxy

Authentication:

  • HTTP/HTTPS proxies: Full authentication support via proxy_username and proxy_password
  • SOCKS proxies: Authentication not supported by Chromium's proxy implementation
  • If credentials are configured, authentication happens automatically (no dialog)
  • If credentials are empty and proxy requires auth, interactive dialog will appear

Examples:

  • SOCKS5 proxy (no auth): proxy_server=socks5://127.0.0.1:1080
  • HTTP proxy: proxy_server=http://proxy.example.com:8080
  • HTTPS proxy: proxy_server=https://secure-proxy.example.com:443
  • Corporate proxy: proxy_server=http://proxy.corp.local:3128

Note: Set proxy_enabled=false or leave proxy_server empty to disable proxy.

Graphics Protocols#

Brow6el supports both Sixel and Kitty graphics protocols with automatic terminal detection.

Sixel Protocol (recommended):

  • Default and most widely supported
  • Supports both tiled and monolithic rendering
  • Tiled rendering reduces flicker significantly
  • Generally faster for typing-heavy workflows
  • Supported terminals: mlterm, xterm, wezterm, foot, etc.

Kitty Protocol:

  • Alternative graphics protocol for Kitty-compatible terminals
  • Always uses monolithic rendering (entire screen redrawn)
  • Double buffering prevents flicker
  • 30 FPS frame rate for smooth animations
  • Supported terminals: kitty, ghostty, wezterm, etc.

Configuration (~/.brow6el/browser.conf):

# Graphics protocol selection
graphics_protocol=auto  # auto, sixel, or kitty

# Tiled rendering (Sixel only)
tiled_rendering=true

# Optional: Override auto-detected terminal cell dimensions
#cell_width=11
#cell_height=25

Runtime Controls:

  • Press z (in STANDARD mode) to toggle tiled/monolithic rendering (Sixel only)
  • Press Z (in STANDARD mode) to force full redraw
  • Current mode shown in status bar: [S][T] (Sixel tiled), [S][M] (Sixel monolithic), [S] (Kitty)

How It Works:

Sixel Tiled Rendering:

  • Tiles dynamically sized based on terminal resolution (~30-40 tiles per screen)
  • CEF dirty rectangles indicate changed regions
  • Only tiles intersecting dirty regions are redrawn
  • Tiles aligned to terminal cell boundaries for artifact-free rendering

Kitty Monolithic Rendering:

  • Entire screen encoded as RGBA and transmitted via base64
  • Double buffering (alternating image IDs) prevents flicker
  • Uncompressed for optimal typing performance
  • Images placed below text layer (z=-1) so dialogs appear on top

Zoom Control#

Brow6el provides intelligent zoom control with three modes and per-site customization.

Keyboard Controls (STANDARD mode):

  • + or = - Zoom in
  • - or _ - Zoom out
  • 0 - Reset zoom to 1.0x

Zoom Modes:

Auto Mode (default_zoom_behavior=auto):

  • Automatically calculates optimal zoom based on:
    • Terminal cell size (DPI adaptation) - 60% weight
    • Window resolution - 40% weight
  • Larger windows get bigger text, smaller windows get compact text
  • Adapts to high-DPI displays and large fonts
  • Recalculates on window resize
  • Range: 0.5x to 3.0x

Fixed Mode (default_zoom_behavior=fixed):

  • Uses zoom level from zoom_level setting
  • Consistent zoom across all pages
  • Ideal for high-DPI displays that need constant scaling

None Mode (default_zoom_behavior=none):

  • Starts at 1.0x zoom
  • Manual control only via keyboard shortcuts
  • No automatic adjustments

Per-Site Zoom:

Create ~/.brow6el/zoom.conf for site-specific zoom levels that override auto/fixed modes:

# Format: domain=zoom_multiplier
github.com=2.5
wikipedia.org=2.75
google.com=2.0

Site-specific zoom works with subdomains (e.g., github.com matches www.github.com).

Configuration (~/.brow6el/browser.conf):

# Default zoom level for fixed mode
zoom_level=2.5

# Zoom step for +/- keyboard shortcuts
zoom_step=0.25

# Zoom behavior: auto, fixed, or none
default_zoom_behavior=auto

Auto Zoom Formula:

  • Reference: 1600x900 resolution, 10x20 pixel cells
  • Cell zoom = (cell_height/20 × 0.7) + (cell_width/10 × 0.3)
  • Resolution zoom = (window_height/900 × 0.5) + (window_width/1600 × 0.5)
  • Final zoom = (cell_zoom × 0.6) + (resolution_zoom × 0.4)

This ensures text is readable on both high-DPI laptops and large desktop monitors.

JavaScript Console#

  • Press c (in STANDARD mode) to open/close the console
  • Type JavaScript and press Enter to execute
  • Scroll through output with ↑/↓
  • All console.log/warn/error messages are captured

CEF Configuration#

Brow6el uses a configuration file for Chromium command-line flags. On first run, a default configuration is created at ~/.brow6el/cef_flags.conf.

Features:

  • Enable/disable WebGL support
  • Configure rendering options
  • Adjust logging verbosity
  • Set custom user agent
  • And more!

Edit the config:

nano ~/.brow6el/cef_flags.conf

Changes take effect on next browser start. See the config file for available options and documentation links.

Privacy & Data#

What persists:

  • Bookmarks (~/.brow6el/bookmarks)
  • User scripts (~/.brow6el/userscripts/)
  • User script config (~/.brow6el/userscripts.conf)
  • CEF flags config (~/.brow6el/cef_flags.conf)

What doesn't persist (default temporary mode, persists in persistent mode):

  • Cookies (cleared on exit)
  • localStorage (cleared on exit)
  • Cache (cleared on exit)
  • History (not stored)

Each browser instance uses an isolated cache directory /tmp/brow6el_<PID> that is automatically deleted when you close the browser.

Multiple Instances#

You can run multiple browser instances simultaneously:

# Terminal 1
./build/run_brow6el.sh https://github.com

# Terminal 2
./build/run_brow6el.sh https://google.com

# Terminal 3
./build/run_brow6el.sh https://example.com

Requirements#

Graphics-capable terminal: Terminal emulator supporting Sixel or Kitty graphics protocols:

  • Sixel (recommended): mlterm, xterm, foot, wezterm, yaft, etc.
  • Kitty: kitty, ghostty, wezterm, etc.

The browser automatically detects graphics support - no manual configuration needed. If both protocols are supported, Sixel is preferred by default.

Build Dependencies:

# Ubuntu/Debian
sudo apt-get update
sudo apt-get install -y \
    build-essential cmake git pkg-config curl \
    libsixel-dev \
    libx11-dev libxcomposite-dev libxdamage-dev libxext-dev libxfixes-dev \
    libxrandr-dev libgbm-dev libxcb1-dev \
    libpango1.0-dev libatk1.0-dev libcups2-dev libasound2-dev \
    libnss3-dev libnspr4-dev libglib2.0-dev

# Arch Linux
sudo pacman -S base-devel cmake git pkg-config curl \
    libsixel \
    libx11 libxcomposite libxdamage libxfixes libxrandr \
    mesa pango atk cups alsa-lib nss nspr glib2

Runtime Dependencies (automatically satisfied on most systems):

  • libsixel, X11 libraries, NSS/NSPR (SSL), GLib, D-Bus, ALSA, Pango, Cairo

How It Works#

CEF renders web pages offscreen → Graphics conversion (Sixel or Kitty protocol) → Output to terminal

Sixel pipeline: CEF BGRA buffer → libsixel conversion → Sixel escape sequences
Kitty pipeline: CEF BGRA buffer → RGBA conversion → base64 encoding → Kitty escape sequences

The browser continuously renders at 30 FPS, with synchronized input handling for mouse and keyboard events.

Distributions packages (community)#

  • Artix Linux, in the Omniverse repository : https://wiki.artixlinux.org/Main/Repositories#Omniverse
  • Arch Linux, in the Arch User Repository (AUR) : https://aur.archlinux.org/packages/brow6el-git
  • Debian, in Vejeta's unofficial repository (includes brow6el and latest libcef releases) : https://debian.vejeta.com

License#

MIT

Uses CEF (BSD clause 3 exception) and libsixel (MIT). See respective licenses for details.

Press g in MOUSE mode to activate: Adaptive Grid Overlay - A 3x3 grid with labeled cells appears (default keys: qweasdzxc) Quick Jump - Press a key (q/w/e/a/s/d/z/x/c) to jump to that grid cell Recursive Zoom - Automatically shows sub-grid in selected cell for precision Visual Feedback - Green grid indicates more zoom levels available, red indicates maximum zoom Auto-Precision_movement - At maximum zoom, grid switches to cursor movement mode with high precision Navigation - Backspace to zoom out, ESC to exit grid mode Configurable Keys - Customize grid keys in ~/.brow6el/browser.conf (grid_keys setting) Grid mode enables precise element selection with just 3-4 keystrokes, combining speed with accuracy. Inspect Mode# While in MOUSE mode, press i to toggle inspect mode. This feature works similar to browser DevTools inspector: Element Highlighting - Cyan border around the element under cursor Info Panel - Shows element details including: Tag name, ID, and classes Key attributes (href, src, type, name, etc.) Dimensions and position Text content preview Real-time Updates - Info updates as you move the cursor Toggle Off - Press i again to exit inspect mode This is useful for debugging web pages, understanding page structure, or finding specific elements. Smart Mode Switching# The browser automatically switches modes based on context: Clicking an input field in MOUSE mode → Auto-switch to INSERT mode Clicking a select box in MOUSE mode → Auto-switch to STANDARD mode Page navigation → Auto-reset to STANDARD mode Advanced Navigation Modes# Hint Mode (f key)# Press f to show yellow hint labels on all links. Type the hint label (e.g., "a", "ab") and press Enter to navigate. This provides keyboard-only navigation without needing a mouse. Press ESC or f again to exit. Mouse Emulation Mode (e key)# Press e to activate a yellow mouse cursor overlay. Use hjkl or arrow keys to move it around the page and press SPACE/Enter to click at that position. q toggles precision mode, f toggles fast mode. Press i to toggle inspect mode which shows detailed element information as you hover. This works on all elements including iframes and consent dialogs. Press ESC or e again to exit. Quick Start# # 1. Download CEF binary (~670MB, one-time) ./download_cef.sh # 2. Build ./build.sh # 3. Run ./build/run_brow6el.sh https://example.com # Multiple instances supported! # Open additional terminals and run more instances Examples# The examples/ directory contains: userscripts/ - Example user scripts (dark mode, Google customization, etc.) See examples/README.md for details. Advanced Features# Bookmarks# Press d (in STANDARD mode) to bookmark the current page Press b (in STANDARD mode) to view and manage bookmarks Navigate with ↑/↓ or j/k, press Enter to open, 'd' to delete Bookmarks stored in ~/.brow6el/bookmarks User Scripts# Custom JavaScript injection system similar to Greasemonkey/Tampermonkey. Quick Start: Create script directory: mkdir -p ~/.brow6el/userscripts Add .js files to the directory Configure URL patterns in ~/.brow6el/userscripts.conf Press s to manually inject or y to toggle auto-inject Example config (~/.brow6el/userscripts.conf): auto_inject=true dark-mode.js|Dark Mode|true|* google-custom.js|Google Custom|true|*google.com*,*google.co.* See USERSCRIPTS.md for detailed documentation. Bundled Scripts: The browser comes with several pre-installed scripts in the scripts/ directory: view-source.js - View HTML source code with syntax highlighting, formatting, and line numbers (keyboard navigable) reader-mode.js - Simplifies pages to just article content (like Firefox Reader View) adblock.js - Basic ad blocking functionality force-light-mode.js - Forces light color scheme on all pages frameset-redirect.js - Redirects from frameset pages to actual content To use bundled scripts, add them to your ~/.brow6el/userscripts.conf: view-source.js|View Page Source|true|* Then press s to open the user scripts menu and select "View Page Source", or enable auto-inject and press the script's trigger key. Profile Modes# Brow6el supports different profile modes for different use cases: Temporary Mode (Default): Each session uses a new profile All data (cookies, cache, history) deleted on exit Perfect for private browsing No data persists between sessions Persistent Mode: Profile saved in ~/.brow6el/profile Cookies and login sessions maintained Cache speeds up repeated visits Works like a normal browser Configuration (~/.brow6el/browser.conf): # Choose profile mode: temporary, persistent, or custom profile_mode=temporary # Custom profile location (when mode=custom) profile_path=~/.brow6el/profile # Cache settings cache_size_mb=500 clear_cache_on_exit=false # Privacy options (for persistent/custom) clear_cookies_on_exit=false # Default homepage URL default_url=https://example.com # Grid keys for mouse emulation grid jump (must be exactly 9 characters) # Default: qweasdzxc (3x3 grid matching keyboard layout) # Alternative: abcdefghi (alphabetical) grid_keys=qweasdzxc # Graphics Protocol Selection # Choose graphics protocol: auto, sixel, or kitty # auto: Detect terminal capabilities (default) # sixel: Force Sixel protocol (recommended, faster) # kitty: Force Kitty graphics protocol graphics_protocol=auto # DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH) Configuration # Enable secure DNS to encrypt DNS queries doh_enabled=false doh_server=https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query doh_mode=secure # DoH mode options: # secure: Mandatory DoH, no fallback (recommended for blocking) # automatic: Use DoH when available, fallback to system DNS # off: Disable DoH # Popular DoH servers: # Cloudflare: https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query # Google: https://dns.google/dns-query # Quad9: https://dns.quad9.net/dns-query # Tiled Rendering (Sixel only) # Enable tile-based sixel rendering (reduces flicker on updates) # When enabled, only changed screen regions are redrawn # When disabled, the entire screen is redrawn on every update # Note: Kitty protocol always uses monolithic rendering tiled_rendering=true # Terminal Cell Dimensions (optional override) # Leave at 0 for auto-detection (recommended) # Only override if auto-detection produces incorrect results #cell_width=0 #cell_height=0 # Zoom settings # Default zoom level (1.0 = no zoom, 2.0 = 2x zoom) zoom_level=2.5 # Zoom step size for +/- keyboard shortcuts zoom_step=0.25 # Default zoom behavior: auto, fixed, or none # auto: Automatically adjust zoom based on terminal DPI and window size # fixed: Use fixed zoom level from zoom_level setting # none: No automatic zoom (start at 1.0x, manual control only) default_zoom_behavior=fixed # Proxy Configuration # Route browser traffic through HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS proxy proxy_enabled=false proxy_server= proxy_username= proxy_password= proxy_bypass_list=localhost,127.0.0.1 Examples: Private browsing: profile_mode=temporary (default) Normal browsing: profile_mode=persistent Multiple profiles: profile_mode=custom with different paths Semi-private: persistent with clear_cookies_on_exit=true Secure DNS with blocking: doh_enabled=true with doh_mode=secure HTTP proxy with auth: proxy_enabled=true, proxy_server=http://proxy.local:8080, proxy_username=user DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH)# Brow6el supports DNS-over-HTTPS to encrypt DNS queries and prevent DNS-based tracking or blocking. Configuration (~/.brow6el/browser.conf): doh_enabled=true doh_server=https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query doh_mode=secure DoH Modes: secure - Mandatory DoH with no fallback to system DNS (recommended for ad-blocking/privacy) automatic - Attempts DoH first, falls back to system DNS on failure off - Disables DoH Popular DoH Providers: Cloudflare: https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query (fast, privacy-focused) Google: https://dns.google/dns-query (reliable, global) Quad9: https://dns.quad9.net/dns-query (security-focused, blocks malicious domains) Note: When using secure mode, ensure your DoH server resolves google.com (used by CEF for connectivity checks) or allows all domains, otherwise DoH may fail to initialize. Proxy Configuration# Brow6el supports routing browser traffic through HTTP, HTTPS, and SOCKS proxies with optional authentication. Configuration (~/.brow6el/browser.conf): # Enable proxy proxy_enabled=true # Proxy server (format: scheme://host:port - NO credentials in URL) # Supported: http://, https://, socks4://, socks5:// proxy_server=http://127.0.0.1:8080 # Proxy authentication (optional) # Leave empty if proxy doesn't require authentication proxy_username=myuser proxy_password=mypass # Bypass proxy for these hosts (comma-separated) proxy_bypass_list=localhost,127.0.0.1,*.local Proxy Schemes: http:// - HTTP proxy https:// - HTTPS proxy (connects to proxy via HTTPS) socks4:// - SOCKS v4 proxy socks5:// - SOCKS v5 proxy Authentication: HTTP/HTTPS proxies: Full authentication support via proxy_username and proxy_password SOCKS proxies: Authentication not supported by Chromium's proxy implementation If credentials are configured, authentication happens automatically (no dialog) If credentials are empty and proxy requires auth, interactive dialog will appear Examples: SOCKS5 proxy (no auth): proxy_server=socks5://127.0.0.1:1080 HTTP proxy: proxy_server=http://proxy.example.com:8080 HTTPS proxy: proxy_server=https://secure-proxy.example.com:443 Corporate proxy: proxy_server=http://proxy.corp.local:3128 Note: Set proxy_enabled=false or leave proxy_server empty to disable proxy. Graphics Protocols# Brow6el supports both Sixel and Kitty graphics protocols with automatic terminal detection. Sixel Protocol (recommended): Default and most widely supported Supports both tiled and monolithic rendering Tiled rendering reduces flicker significantly Generally faster for typing-heavy workflows Supported terminals: mlterm, xterm, wezterm, foot, etc. Kitty Protocol: Alternative graphics protocol for Kitty-compatible terminals Always uses monolithic rendering (entire screen redrawn) Double buffering prevents flicker 30 FPS frame rate for smooth animations Supported terminals: kitty, ghostty, wezterm, etc. Configuration (~/.brow6el/browser.conf): # Graphics protocol selection graphics_protocol=auto # auto, sixel, or kitty # Tiled rendering (Sixel only) tiled_rendering=true # Optional: Override auto-detected terminal cell dimensions #cell_width=11 #cell_height=25 Runtime Controls: Press z (in STANDARD mode) to toggle tiled/monolithic rendering (Sixel only) Press Z (in STANDARD mode) to force full redraw Current mode shown in status bar: [S][T] (Sixel tiled), [S][M] (Sixel monolithic), [S] (Kitty) How It Works: Sixel Tiled Rendering: Tiles dynamically sized based on terminal resolution (~30-40 tiles per screen) CEF dirty rectangles indicate changed regions Only tiles intersecting dirty regions are redrawn Tiles aligned to terminal cell boundaries for artifact-free rendering Kitty Monolithic Rendering: Entire screen encoded as RGBA and transmitted via base64 Double buffering (alternating image IDs) prevents flicker Uncompressed for optimal typing performance Images placed below text layer (z=-1) so dialogs appear on top Zoom Control# Brow6el provides intelligent zoom control with three modes and per-site customization. Keyboard Controls (STANDARD mode): + or = - Zoom in - or _ - Zoom out 0 - Reset zoom to 1.0x Zoom Modes: Auto Mode (default_zoom_behavior=auto): Automatically calculates optimal zoom based on: Terminal cell size (DPI adaptation) - 60% weight Window resolution - 40% weight Larger windows get bigger text, smaller windows get compact text Adapts to high-DPI displays and large fonts Recalculates on window resize Range: 0.5x to 3.0x Fixed Mode (default_zoom_behavior=fixed): Uses zoom level from zoom_level setting Consistent zoom across all pages Ideal for high-DPI displays that need constant scaling None Mode (default_zoom_behavior=none): Starts at 1.0x zoom Manual control only via keyboard shortcuts No automatic adjustments Per-Site Zoom: Create ~/.brow6el/zoom.conf for site-specific zoom levels that override auto/fixed modes: # Format: domain=zoom_multiplier github.com=2.5 wikipedia.org=2.75 google.com=2.0 Site-specific zoom works with subdomains (e.g., github.com matches www.github.com). Configuration (~/.brow6el/browser.conf): # Default zoom level for fixed mode zoom_level=2.5 # Zoom step for +/- keyboard shortcuts zoom_step=0.25 # Zoom behavior: auto, fixed, or none default_zoom_behavior=auto Auto Zoom Formula: Reference: 1600x900 resolution, 10x20 pixel cells Cell zoom = (cell_height/20 × 0.7) + (cell_width/10 × 0.3) Resolution zoom = (window_height/900 × 0.5) + (window_width/1600 × 0.5) Final zoom = (cell_zoom × 0.6) + (resolution_zoom × 0.4) This ensures text is readable on both high-DPI laptops and large desktop monitors. JavaScript Console# Press c (in STANDARD mode) to open/close the console Type JavaScript and press Enter to execute Scroll through output with ↑/↓ All console.log/warn/error messages are captured CEF Configuration# Brow6el uses a configuration file for Chromium command-line flags. On first run, a default configuration is created at ~/.brow6el/cef_flags.conf. Features: Enable/disable WebGL support Configure rendering options Adjust logging verbosity Set custom user agent And more! Edit the config: nano ~/.brow6el/cef_flags.conf Changes take effect on next browser start. See the config file for available options and documentation links. Privacy & Data# What persists: Bookmarks (~/.brow6el/bookmarks) User scripts (~/.brow6el/userscripts/) User script config (~/.brow6el/userscripts.conf) CEF flags config (~/.brow6el/cef_flags.conf) What doesn't persist (default temporary mode, persists in persistent mode): Cookies (cleared on exit) localStorage (cleared on exit) Cache (cleared on exit) History (not stored) Each browser instance uses an isolated cache directory /tmp/brow6el_<PID> that is automatically deleted when you close the browser. Multiple Instances# You can run multiple browser instances simultaneously: # Terminal 1 ./build/run_brow6el.sh https://github.com # Terminal 2 ./build/run_brow6el.sh https://google.com # Terminal 3 ./build/run_brow6el.sh https://example.com Requirements# Graphics-capable terminal: Terminal emulator supporting Sixel or Kitty graphics protocols: Sixel (recommended): mlterm, xterm, foot, wezterm, yaft, etc. Kitty: kitty, ghostty, wezterm, etc. The browser automatically detects graphics support - no manual configuration needed. If both protocols are supported, Sixel is preferred by default. Build Dependencies: # Ubuntu/Debian sudo apt-get update sudo apt-get install -y \ build-essential cmake git pkg-config curl \ libsixel-dev \ libx11-dev libxcomposite-dev libxdamage-dev libxext-dev libxfixes-dev \ libxrandr-dev libgbm-dev libxcb1-dev \ libpango1.0-dev libatk1.0-dev libcups2-dev libasound2-dev \ libnss3-dev libnspr4-dev libglib2.0-dev # Arch Linux sudo pacman -S base-devel cmake git pkg-config curl \ libsixel \ libx11 libxcomposite libxdamage libxfixes libxrandr \ mesa pango atk cups alsa-lib nss nspr glib2 Runtime Dependencies (automatically satisfied on most systems): libsixel, X11 libraries, NSS/NSPR (SSL), GLib, D-Bus, ALSA, Pango, Cairo How It Works# CEF renders web pages offscreen → Graphics conversion (Sixel or Kitty protocol) → Output to terminal Sixel pipeline: CEF BGRA buffer → libsixel conversion → Sixel escape sequences Kitty pipeline: CEF BGRA buffer → RGBA conversion → base64 encoding → Kitty escape sequences The browser continuously renders at 30 FPS, with synchronized input handling for mouse and keyboard events. Distributions packages (community)# Artix Linux, in the Omniverse repository : https://wiki.artixlinux.org/Main/Repositories#Omniverse Arch Linux, in the Arch User Repository (AUR) : https://aur.archlinux.org/packages/brow6el-git Debian, in Vejeta's unofficial repository (includes brow6el and latest libcef releases) : https://debian.vejeta.com License# MIT Uses CEF (BSD clause 3 exception) and libsixel (MIT). See respective licenses for details.

blocks.html_en: A full-featured web browser for the terminal using Chromium (CEF) with support for Sixel and Kitty graphics protocols.

sentences.en: A full-featured web browser for the terminal using Chromium (CEF) with support for Sixel and Kitty graphics protocols.
sentences.zh: 适用于使用 Chromium (CEF) 的终端的全功能 Web 浏览器，支持 Sixel 和 Kitty 图形协议。

blocks.html_en: WARNING: Kitty image support (currently only in main branch builds) by its design nature is barelly usable in SSH when brow6el runs on remote host, this feature is usable when brow6el is executed on localhost. On ssh the responsivenes of browser is significantly affected, due to massive data transfers on each frame rendered

sentences.en: WARNING: Kitty image support (currently only in main branch builds) by its design nature is barelly usable in SSH when brow6el runs on remote host, this feature is usable when brow6el is executed on localhost.
sentences.zh: 警告：当 brow6el 在远程主机上运行时，Kitty 图像支持（当前仅在主分支构建中）就其设计性质而言几乎无法在 SSH 中使用，当 brow6el 在本地主机上执行时，此功能可用。

sentences.en: On ssh the responsivenes of browser is significantly affected, due to massive data transfers on each frame rendered
sentences.zh: 在 ssh 上，由于渲染的每个帧上有大量数据传输，浏览器的响应能力受到显着影响

blocks.html_en: • Modern Web - Full HTML5/CSS3/JavaScript support via Chromium

sentences.en: Modern Web - Full HTML5/CSS3/JavaScript support via Chromium
sentences.zh: 现代网络 - 通过 Chromium 提供完整的 HTML5/CSS3/JavaScript 支持

sentences.en: Vim-Style Modal Control#
sentences.zh: Vim 风格的模态控制#

blocks.html_en: Brow6el uses a vim-inspired modal keyboard interface with three modes. The current mode is always shown in the status bar (e.g., [S][T] for Standard mode with Tiled rendering).

sentences.en: Brow6el uses a vim-inspired modal keyboard interface with three modes.
sentences.zh: Brow6el 使用受 vim 启发的模式键盘界面，具有三种模式。

sentences.en: The current mode is always shown in the status bar (e.g., [S][T] for Standard mode with Tiled rendering).
sentences.zh: 当前模式始终显示在状态栏中（例如，[S][T] 表示具有平铺渲染的标准模式）。

sentences.en: STANDARD Mode [S] - Default#
sentences.zh: 标准模式 [S] - 默认#

blocks.html_en: Vim-like navigation with single-key commands (no Ctrl required):

sentences.en: Vim-like navigation with single-key commands (no Ctrl required):
sentences.zh: 类似 Vim 的单键命令导航（无需 Ctrl）：

sentences.en: Navigation:
sentences.zh: 导航：

sentences.en: h/j/k/l or arrow keys - Navigate (left/down/up/right)
sentences.zh: h/j/k/l 或箭头键 - 导航（左/下/上/右）

sentences.en: t/g - Scroll up/down
sentences.zh: t/g - 向上/向下滚动

sentences.en: p/n - Back/forward in history
sentences.zh: p/n - 历史记录中的后退/前进

sentences.en: Actions:
sentences.zh: 行动：

sentences.en: r - Reload page
sentences.zh: r - 重新加载页面

sentences.en: u - Navigate to URL
sentences.zh: u - 导航到 URL

sentences.en: U - Copy current URL to clipboard (Shift+U)
sentences.zh: U - 将当前 URL 复制到剪贴板 (Shift+U)

sentences.en: c - Toggle JavaScript console
sentences.zh: c - 切换 JavaScript 控制台

sentences.en: d - Add bookmark
sentences.zh: d - 添加书签

sentences.en: b - Open bookmarks
sentences.zh: b - 打开书签

sentences.en: f - Hint mode (keyboard link navigation)
sentences.zh: f - 提示模式（键盘链接导航）

sentences.en: s - User scripts menu
sentences.zh: s - 用户脚本菜单

sentences.en: y - Toggle auto-inject user scripts
sentences.zh: y - 切换自动注入用户脚本

blocks.html_en: • z - Toggle tiled rendering (Sixel only, reduces flicker)

sentences.en: z - Toggle tiled rendering (Sixel only, reduces flicker)
sentences.zh: z - 切换平铺渲染（仅限 Sixel，减少闪烁）

blocks.html_en: • Z - Force full redraw (Sixel: monolithic render, Kitty: full refresh)

sentences.en: Z - Force full redraw (Sixel: monolithic render, Kitty: full refresh)
sentences.zh: Z - 强制完全重画（Sixel：整体渲染，Kitty：完全刷新）

sentences.en: m - Open downloads manager
sentences.zh: m - 打开下载管理器

sentences.en: x - Exit browser
sentences.zh: x - 退出浏览器

sentences.en: Zoom Controls:
sentences.zh: 缩放控制：

sentences.en: + or = - Zoom in
sentences.zh: + 或 = - 放大

sentences.en: - or _ - Zoom out
sentences.zh: - 或 _ - 缩小

sentences.en: 0 - Reset zoom to 1.0x
sentences.zh: 0 - 将缩放重置为 1.0x

sentences.en: Mode Switch:
sentences.zh: 模式切换：

sentences.en: i - Enter INSERT mode
sentences.zh: i - 进入插入模式

sentences.en: e - Enter MOUSE mode
sentences.zh: e - 进入鼠标模式

sentences.en: v - Enter VISUAL mode (text selection)
sentences.zh: v - 进入 VISUAL 模式（文本选择）

sentences.en: INSERT Mode [I]#
sentences.zh: 插入模式[I]#

blocks.html_en: All keypresses pass through to the webpage. Use for typing in forms, text areas, etc.

sentences.en: All keypresses pass through to the webpage.
sentences.zh: 所有按键都会传递到网页。

sentences.en: Use for typing in forms, text areas, etc.
sentences.zh: 用于在表单、文本区域等中键入。

sentences.en: Exit: ESC - Return to STANDARD mode
sentences.zh: 退出：ESC - 返回标准模式

sentences.en: VISUAL Mode [V]#
sentences.zh: 视觉模式 [V]#

blocks.html_en: Text selection mode for copying page content. The caret starts at the first visible text, or if coming from MOUSE mode, at the mouse cursor position.

sentences.en: Text selection mode for copying page content.
sentences.zh: 用于复制页面内容的文本选择模式。

sentences.en: The caret starts at the first visible text, or if coming from MOUSE mode, at the mouse cursor position.
sentences.zh: 插入符号从第一个可见文本开始，或者如果来自鼠标模式，则从鼠标光标位置开始。

sentences.en: Caret Positioning (initial):
sentences.zh: 插入符定位（初始）：

sentences.en: h - Move cursor left by character
sentences.zh: h - 将光标向左移动一个字符

sentences.en: l - Move cursor right by character
sentences.zh: l - 按字符向右移动光标

sentences.en: w - Move cursor forward by word
sentences.zh: w - 按单词向前移动光标

sentences.en: b - Move cursor backward by word
sentences.zh: b - 按单词向后移动光标

sentences.en: j - Move cursor down by line
sentences.zh: j - 将光标向下移动一行

sentences.en: k - Move cursor up by line
sentences.zh: k - 将光标向上移动一行

sentences.en: v - Start selecting from current position
sentences.zh: v - 从当前位置开始选择

sentences.en: Selection (after pressing v):
sentences.zh: 选择（按 v 后）：

sentences.en: h - Extend selection left by character
sentences.zh: h - 按字符向左扩展选择

sentences.en: l - Extend selection right by character
sentences.zh: l - 按字符扩展选择

sentences.en: w - Extend selection forward by word
sentences.zh: w - 按单词向前扩展选择

sentences.en: b - Extend selection backward by word
sentences.zh: b - 按单词向后扩展选择

sentences.en: j - Extend selection down by line
sentences.zh: j - 按行向下扩展选择

sentences.en: k - Extend selection up by line
sentences.zh: k - 按行向上扩展选择

sentences.en: Actions:
sentences.zh: 行动：

blocks.html_en: • y - Copy selection to clipboard, exit VISUAL mode

sentences.en: y - Copy selection to clipboard, exit VISUAL mode
sentences.zh: y - 将选择复制到剪贴板，退出 VISUAL 模式

sentences.en: ESC - Cancel selection, exit VISUAL mode
sentences.zh: ESC - 取消选择，退出 VISUAL 模式

blocks.html_en: Tip: Use MOUSE mode (e) to position cursor, then press ESC and v to start text selection at that exact position!

sentences.en: Tip: Use MOUSE mode (e) to position cursor, then press ESC and v to start text selection at that exact position!
sentences.zh: 提示：使用鼠标模式 (e) 定位光标，然后按 ESC 和 v 在该确切位置开始文本选择！

sentences.en: MOUSE Mode [M]#
sentences.zh: 鼠标模式[M]#

sentences.en: Keyboard-driven mouse emulation with visual cursor:
sentences.zh: 带有可视光标的键盘驱动鼠标模拟：

sentences.en: Movement:
sentences.zh: 移动：

sentences.en: h/j/k/l or arrow keys - Move mouse (left/down/up/right)
sentences.zh: h/j/k/l 或箭头键 - 移动鼠标（左/下/上/右）

sentences.en: q/f - Toggle precision/fast speed
sentences.zh: q/f - 切换精度/快速

sentences.en: r - Toggle drag-and-drop
sentences.zh: r - 切换拖放

sentences.en: g - Toggle grid jump mode (fast navigation)
sentences.zh: g - 切换网格跳跃模式（快速导航）

sentences.en: Actions:
sentences.zh: 行动：

blocks.html_en: • SPACE or ENTER - Click at cursor position or drop

sentences.en: SPACE or ENTER - Click at cursor position or drop
sentences.zh: SPACE 或 ENTER - 单击光标位置或放下

blocks.html_en: • i - Toggle inspect mode (show element info on hover)

sentences.en: i - Toggle inspect mode (show element info on hover)
sentences.zh: i - 切换检查模式（悬停时显示元素信息）

sentences.en: r - Drop when drag-and-drop is active
sentences.zh: r - 拖放处于活动状态时放下

sentences.en: Exit: e or ESC - Return to STANDARD mode
sentences.zh: 退出：e 或 ESC - 返回标准模式

sentences.en: Grid Jump Mode#
sentences.zh: 网格跳跃模式#

blocks.html_en: Fast mouse positioning using keyboard-driven grid navigation. Press g in MOUSE mode to activate:

sentences.en: Fast mouse positioning using keyboard-driven grid navigation.
sentences.zh: 使用键盘驱动的网格导航快速鼠标定位。

sentences.en: Press g in MOUSE mode to activate:
sentences.zh: 在鼠标模式下按 g 激活：

blocks.html_en: • Adaptive Grid Overlay - A 3x3 grid with labeled cells appears (default keys: qweasdzxc)

sentences.en: Adaptive Grid Overlay - A 3x3 grid with labeled cells appears (default keys: qweasdzxc)
sentences.zh: 自适应网格覆盖 - 出现带有标记单元格的 3x3 网格（默认键：qweasdzxc）

blocks.html_en: • Quick Jump - Press a key (q/w/e/a/s/d/z/x/c) to jump to that grid cell

sentences.en: Quick Jump - Press a key (q/w/e/a/s/d/z/x/c) to jump to that grid cell
sentences.zh: 快速跳转 - 按一个键 (q/w/e/a/s/d/z/x/c) 跳转到该网格单元

blocks.html_en: • Recursive Zoom - Automatically shows sub-grid in selected cell for precision

sentences.en: Recursive Zoom - Automatically shows sub-grid in selected cell for precision
sentences.zh: 递归缩放 - 自动显示所选单元格中的子网格以确保精度

blocks.html_en: • Visual Feedback - Green grid indicates more zoom levels available, red indicates maximum zoom

sentences.en: Visual Feedback - Green grid indicates more zoom levels available, red indicates maximum zoom
sentences.zh: 视觉反馈 - 绿色网格表示更多可用缩放级别，红色表示最大缩放

blocks.html_en: • Auto-Precision_movement - At maximum zoom, grid switches to cursor movement mode with high precision

sentences.en: Auto-Precision_movement - At maximum zoom, grid switches to cursor movement mode with high precision
sentences.zh: Auto-Precision_movement - 在最大缩放时，网格切换到高精度光标移动模式

blocks.html_en: • Navigation - Backspace to zoom out, ESC to exit grid mode

sentences.en: Navigation - Backspace to zoom out, ESC to exit grid mode
sentences.zh: 导航 - 退格键缩小，ESC 退出网格模式

blocks.html_en: • Configurable Keys - Customize grid keys in ~/.brow6el/browser.conf (grid_keys setting)

sentences.en: Configurable Keys - Customize grid keys in ~/.brow6el/browser.conf (grid_keys setting)
sentences.zh: 可配置的键 - 在 ~/.brow6el/browser.conf 中自定义网格键（grid_keys 设置）

blocks.html_en: Grid mode enables precise element selection with just 3-4 keystrokes, combining speed with accuracy.

sentences.en: Grid mode enables precise element selection with just 3-4 keystrokes, combining speed with accuracy.
sentences.zh: 网格模式只需按 3-4 次按键即可实现精确的元素选择，将速度与准确性结合起来。

sentences.en: Inspect Mode#
sentences.zh: 检查模式#

blocks.html_en: While in MOUSE mode, press i to toggle inspect mode. This feature works similar to browser DevTools inspector:

sentences.en: While in MOUSE mode, press i to toggle inspect mode.
sentences.zh: 在鼠标模式下，按 i 切换检查模式。

sentences.en: This feature works similar to browser DevTools inspector:
sentences.zh: 此功能的工作原理类似于浏览器 DevTools 检查器：

blocks.html_en: • Element Highlighting - Cyan border around the element under cursor

sentences.en: Element Highlighting - Cyan border around the element under cursor
sentences.zh: 元素突出显示 - 光标下元素周围的青色边框

blocks.html_en:
• Info Panel - Shows element details including:
    • Tag name, ID, and classes
    • Key attributes (href, src, type, name, etc.)
    • Dimensions and position
    • Text content preview

sentences.en: Info Panel - Shows element details including: Tag name, ID, and classes Key attributes (href, src, type, name, etc.) Dimensions and position Text content preview
sentences.zh: 信息面板 - 显示元素详细信息，包括： 标签名称、ID 和类 关键属性（href、src、类型、名称等） 尺寸和位置 文本内容预览

sentences.en: Tag name, ID, and classes
sentences.zh: 标签名称、ID 和类别

sentences.en: Key attributes (href, src, type, name, etc.)
sentences.zh: 关键属性（href、src、类型、名称等）

sentences.en: Dimensions and position
sentences.zh: 尺寸及位置

sentences.en: Text content preview
sentences.zh: 文字内容预览

blocks.html_en: • Real-time Updates - Info updates as you move the cursor

sentences.en: Real-time Updates - Info updates as you move the cursor
sentences.zh: 实时更新 - 移动光标时信息更新

blocks.html_en: • Toggle Off - Press i again to exit inspect mode

sentences.en: Toggle Off - Press i again to exit inspect mode
sentences.zh: 切换关闭 - 再次按 i 退出检查模式

blocks.html_en: This is useful for debugging web pages, understanding page structure, or finding specific elements.

sentences.en: This is useful for debugging web pages, understanding page structure, or finding specific elements.
sentences.zh: 这对于调试网页、理解页面结构或查找特定元素非常有用。

sentences.en: Smart Mode Switching#
sentences.zh: 智能模式切换#

blocks.html_en: The browser automatically switches modes based on context:

sentences.en: The browser automatically switches modes based on context:
sentences.zh: 浏览器根据上下文自动切换模式：

blocks.html_en: • Clicking an input field in MOUSE mode → Auto-switch to INSERT mode

sentences.en: Clicking an input field in MOUSE mode → Auto-switch to INSERT mode
sentences.zh: 在鼠标模式下单击输入字段→自动切换到插入模式

blocks.html_en: • Clicking a select box in MOUSE mode → Auto-switch to STANDARD mode

sentences.en: Clicking a select box in MOUSE mode → Auto-switch to STANDARD mode
sentences.zh: 在鼠标模式下单击选择框→自动切换到标准模式

sentences.en: Page navigation → Auto-reset to STANDARD mode
sentences.zh: 页面导航 → 自动重置为标准模式

sentences.en: Advanced Navigation Modes#
sentences.zh: 高级导航模式#

sentences.en: Hint Mode (f key)#
sentences.zh: 提示模式（f键）#

blocks.html_en: Press f to show yellow hint labels on all links. Type the hint label (e.g., "a", "ab") and press Enter to navigate. This provides keyboard-only navigation without needing a mouse. Press ESC or f again to exit.

sentences.en: Press f to show yellow hint labels on all links.
sentences.zh: 按 f 可在所有链接上显示黄色提示标签。

sentences.en: Type the hint label (e.g., "a", "ab") and press Enter to navigate.
sentences.zh: 输入提示标签（例如“a”、“ab”）并按 Enter 进行导航。

sentences.en: This provides keyboard-only navigation without needing a mouse.
sentences.zh: 这提供了仅键盘导航，无需鼠标。

sentences.en: Press ESC or f again to exit.
sentences.zh: 再次按 ESC 或 f 退出。

blocks.html_en: Mouse Emulation Mode (e key)#

sentences.en: Mouse Emulation Mode (e key)#
sentences.zh: 鼠标模拟模式（e 键）#

blocks.html_en: Press e to activate a yellow mouse cursor overlay. Use hjkl or arrow keys to move it around the page and press SPACE/Enter to click at that position. q toggles precision mode, f toggles fast mode. Press i to toggle inspect mode which shows detailed element information as you hover. This works on all elements including iframes and consent dialogs. Press ESC or e again to exit.

sentences.en: Press e to activate a yellow mouse cursor overlay.
sentences.zh: 按 e 激活黄色鼠标光标覆盖层。

sentences.en: Use hjkl or arrow keys to move it around the page and press SPACE/Enter to click at that position.
sentences.zh: 使用 hjkl 或箭头键在页面上移动它，然后按 SPACE/Enter 键单击该位置。

sentences.en: q toggles precision mode, f toggles fast mode.
sentences.zh: q 切换精确模式，f 切换快速模式。

sentences.en: Press i to toggle inspect mode which shows detailed element information as you hover.
sentences.zh: 按 i 切换检查模式，当您将鼠标悬停时，该模式会显示详细的元素信息。

sentences.en: This works on all elements including iframes and consent dialogs.
sentences.zh: 这适用于所有元素，包括 iframe 和同意对话框。

sentences.en: Press ESC or e again to exit.
sentences.zh: 再次按 ESC 或 e 退出。

sentences.en: Quick Start#
sentences.zh: 快速入门#

sentences.en: Examples#
sentences.zh: 例子#

sentences.en: The examples/ directory contains:
sentences.zh: 示例/目录包含：

blocks.html_en: • userscripts/ - Example user scripts (dark mode, Google customization, etc.)

sentences.en: userscripts/ - Example user scripts (dark mode, Google customization, etc.)
sentences.zh: userscripts/ - 示例用户脚本（深色模式、Google 自定义等）

sentences.en: See examples/README.md for details.
sentences.zh: 有关详细信息，请参阅示例/README.md。

sentences.en: Advanced Features#
sentences.zh: 高级功能#

sentences.en: Bookmarks#
sentences.zh: 书签#

blocks.html_en: • Press d (in STANDARD mode) to bookmark the current page

sentences.en: Press d (in STANDARD mode) to bookmark the current page
sentences.zh: 按 d（在标准模式下）为当前页面添加书签

blocks.html_en: • Press b (in STANDARD mode) to view and manage bookmarks

sentences.en: Press b (in STANDARD mode) to view and manage bookmarks
sentences.zh: 按 b（在标准模式下）查看和管理书签

blocks.html_en: • Navigate with ↑/↓ or j/k, press Enter to open, 'd' to delete

sentences.en: Navigate with ↑/↓ or j/k, press Enter to open, 'd' to delete
sentences.zh: 使用 ↑/↓ 或 j/k 导航，按 Enter 键打开，按“d”删除

sentences.en: Bookmarks stored in ~/.brow6el/bookmarks
sentences.zh: 书签存储在 ~/.brow6el/bookmarks 中

sentences.en: User Scripts#
sentences.zh: 用户脚本#

blocks.html_en: Custom JavaScript injection system similar to Greasemonkey/Tampermonkey.

sentences.en: Custom JavaScript injection system similar to Greasemonkey/Tampermonkey.
sentences.zh: 自定义 JavaScript 注入系统类似于 Greasemonkey/Tampermonkey。

sentences.en: Quick Start:
sentences.zh: 快速入门：

sentences.en: Create script directory: mkdir -p ~/.brow6el/userscripts
sentences.zh: 创建脚本目录： mkdir -p ~/.brow6el/userscripts

sentences.en: Add .js files to the directory
sentences.zh: 将 .js 文件添加到目录中

sentences.en: Configure URL patterns in ~/.brow6el/userscripts.conf
sentences.zh: 在 ~/.brow6el/userscripts.conf 中配置 URL 模式

blocks.html_en: • Press s to manually inject or y to toggle auto-inject

sentences.en: Press s to manually inject or y to toggle auto-inject
sentences.zh: 按 s 手动注入或按 y 切换自动注入

sentences.en: Example config (~/.brow6el/userscripts.conf):
sentences.zh: 配置示例（~/.brow6el/userscripts.conf）：

sentences.en: See USERSCRIPTS.md for detailed documentation.
sentences.zh: 有关详细文档，请参阅 USERSCRIPTS.md。

blocks.html_en: Bundled Scripts: The browser comes with several pre-installed scripts in the scripts/ directory:

sentences.en: Bundled Scripts: The browser comes with several pre-installed scripts in the scripts/ directory:
sentences.zh: 捆绑脚本：浏览器在 script/ 目录中附带了几个预安装的脚本：

blocks.html_en: • view-source.js - View HTML source code with syntax highlighting, formatting, and line numbers (keyboard navigable)

sentences.en: view-source.js - View HTML source code with syntax highlighting, formatting, and line numbers (keyboard navigable)
sentences.zh: view-source.js - 查看 HTML 源代码，包括语法突出显示、格式设置和行号（键盘可导航）

blocks.html_en: • reader-mode.js - Simplifies pages to just article content (like Firefox Reader View)

sentences.en: reader-mode.js - Simplifies pages to just article content (like Firefox Reader View)
sentences.zh: reader-mode.js - 将页面简化为仅文章内容（如 Firefox Reader View）

sentences.en: adblock.js - Basic ad blocking functionality
sentences.zh: adblock.js - 基本广告拦截功能

blocks.html_en: • force-light-mode.js - Forces light color scheme on all pages

sentences.en: force-light-mode.js - Forces light color scheme on all pages
sentences.zh: force-light-mode.js - 在所有页面上强制使用浅色方案

blocks.html_en: • frameset-redirect.js - Redirects from frameset pages to actual content

sentences.en: frameset-redirect.js - Redirects from frameset pages to actual content
sentences.zh: frameset-redirect.js - 从框架集页面重定向到实际内容

blocks.html_en: To use bundled scripts, add them to your ~/.brow6el/userscripts.conf:

sentences.en: To use bundled scripts, add them to your ~/.brow6el/userscripts.conf:
sentences.zh: 要使用捆绑脚本，请将它们添加到 ~/.brow6el/userscripts.conf 中：

blocks.html_en: Then press s to open the user scripts menu and select "View Page Source", or enable auto-inject and press the script's trigger key.

sentences.en: Then press s to open the user scripts menu and select "View Page Source", or enable auto-inject and press the script's trigger key.
sentences.zh: 然后按 s 打开用户脚本菜单并选择“查看页面源”，或启用自动注入并按脚本的触发键。

sentences.en: Profile Modes#
sentences.zh: 配置文件模式#

blocks.html_en: Brow6el supports different profile modes for different use cases:

sentences.en: Brow6el supports different profile modes for different use cases:
sentences.zh: Brow6el 支持针对不同用例的不同配置文件模式：

sentences.en: Temporary Mode (Default):
sentences.zh: 临时模式（默认）：

sentences.en: Each session uses a new profile
sentences.zh: 每个会话都使用新的配置文件

blocks.html_en: • All data (cookies, cache, history) deleted on exit

sentences.en: All data (cookies, cache, history) deleted on exit
sentences.zh: 退出时删除所有数据（cookie、缓存、历史记录）

sentences.en: Perfect for private browsing
sentences.zh: 非常适合私人浏览

sentences.en: No data persists between sessions
sentences.zh: 会话之间没有数据持续存在

sentences.en: Persistent Mode:
sentences.zh: 持久模式：

sentences.en: Profile saved in ~/.brow6el/profile
sentences.zh: 配置文件保存在 ~/.brow6el/profile 中

sentences.en: Cookies and login sessions maintained
sentences.zh: 维护 Cookie 和登录会话

sentences.en: Cache speeds up repeated visits
sentences.zh: 缓存加速重复访问

sentences.en: Works like a normal browser
sentences.zh: 像普通浏览器一样工作

sentences.en: Configuration (~/.brow6el/browser.conf):
sentences.zh: 配置（~/.brow6el/browser.conf）：

sentences.en: Examples:
sentences.zh: 示例：

sentences.en: Private browsing: profile_mode=temporary (default)
sentences.zh: 隐私浏览：profile_mode=temporary（默认）

sentences.en: Normal browsing: profile_mode=persistent
sentences.zh: 正常浏览：profile_mode=persistent

sentences.en: Multiple profiles: profile_mode=custom with different paths
sentences.zh: 多个配置文件：profile_mode=具有不同路径的自定义

sentences.en: Semi-private: persistent with clear_cookies_on_exit=true
sentences.zh: 半私有：使用clear_cookies_on_exit=true持久化

sentences.en: Secure DNS with blocking: doh_enabled=true with doh_mode=secure
sentences.zh: 通过阻止保护 DNS：doh_enabled=true 和 doh_mode=secure

sentences.en: HTTP proxy with auth: proxy_enabled=true, proxy_server=http://proxy.local:8080, proxy_username=user
sentences.zh: 带身份验证的 HTTP 代理： proxy_enabled=true、proxy_server=http://proxy.local:8080、proxy_username=user

sentences.en: DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH)#

blocks.html_en: Brow6el supports DNS-over-HTTPS to encrypt DNS queries and prevent DNS-based tracking or blocking.

sentences.en: Brow6el supports DNS-over-HTTPS to encrypt DNS queries and prevent DNS-based tracking or blocking.
sentences.zh: Brow6el 支持 DNS-over-HTTPS 以加密 DNS 查询并防止基于 DNS 的跟踪或阻止。

sentences.en: Configuration (~/.brow6el/browser.conf):
sentences.zh: 配置（~/.brow6el/browser.conf）：

sentences.en: DoH Modes:
sentences.zh: 卫生部模式：

blocks.html_en: • secure - Mandatory DoH with no fallback to system DNS (recommended for ad-blocking/privacy)

sentences.en: secure - Mandatory DoH with no fallback to system DNS (recommended for ad-blocking/privacy)
sentences.zh: 安全 - 强制性 DoH，不能回退到系统 DNS（建议用于广告拦截/隐私）

blocks.html_en: • automatic - Attempts DoH first, falls back to system DNS on failure

sentences.en: automatic - Attempts DoH first, falls back to system DNS on failure
sentences.zh: 自动 - 首先尝试 DoH，失败时回退到系统 DNS

sentences.en: off - Disables DoH
sentences.zh: off - 禁用 DoH

sentences.en: Popular DoH Providers:
sentences.zh: 受欢迎的卫生部提供商：

sentences.en: Cloudflare: https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query (fast, privacy-focused)
sentences.zh: Cloudflare：https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query（快速、注重隐私）

sentences.en: Google: https://dns.google/dns-query (reliable, global)
sentences.zh: 谷歌：https://dns.google/dns-query（可靠，全球）

sentences.en: Quad9: https://dns.quad9.net/dns-query (security-focused, blocks malicious domains)
sentences.zh: Quad9：https://dns.quad9.net/dns-query（注重安全，阻止恶意域）

blocks.html_en: Note: When using secure mode, ensure your DoH server resolves google.com (used by CEF for connectivity checks) or allows all domains, otherwise DoH may fail to initialize.

sentences.en: Note: When using secure mode, ensure your DoH server resolves google.com (used by CEF for connectivity checks) or allows all domains, otherwise DoH may fail to initialize.
sentences.zh: 注意：使用安全模式时，请确保您的 DoH 服务器可以解析 google.com（由 CEF 用于连接检查）或允许所有域，否则 DoH 可能无法初始化。

sentences.en: Proxy Configuration#
sentences.zh: 代理配置#

blocks.html_en: Brow6el supports routing browser traffic through HTTP, HTTPS, and SOCKS proxies with optional authentication.

sentences.en: Brow6el supports routing browser traffic through HTTP, HTTPS, and SOCKS proxies with optional authentication.
sentences.zh: Brow6el 支持通过具有可选身份验证的 HTTP、HTTPS 和 SOCKS 代理路由浏览器流量。

sentences.en: Configuration (~/.brow6el/browser.conf):
sentences.zh: 配置（~/.brow6el/browser.conf）：

sentences.en: Proxy Schemes:
sentences.zh: 代理计划：

sentences.en: http:// - HTTP proxy
sentences.zh: http:// - HTTP 代理

blocks.html_en: • https:// - HTTPS proxy (connects to proxy via HTTPS)

sentences.en: https:// - HTTPS proxy (connects to proxy via HTTPS)
sentences.zh: https:// - HTTPS 代理（通过 HTTPS 连接到代理）

sentences.en: socks4:// - SOCKS v4 proxy
sentences.zh: ocks4:// - SOCKS v4 代理

sentences.en: socks5:// - SOCKS v5 proxy
sentences.zh: ocks5:// - SOCKS v5 代理

sentences.en: Authentication:
sentences.zh: 验证：

blocks.html_en: • HTTP/HTTPS proxies: Full authentication support via proxy_username and proxy_password

sentences.en: HTTP/HTTPS proxies: Full authentication support via proxy_username and proxy_password
sentences.zh: HTTP/HTTPS 代理：通过 proxy_username 和 proxy_password 提供完整的身份验证支持

blocks.html_en: • SOCKS proxies: Authentication not supported by Chromium's proxy implementation

sentences.en: SOCKS proxies: Authentication not supported by Chromium's proxy implementation
sentences.zh: SOCKS 代理：Chromium 的代理实现不支持身份验证

blocks.html_en: • If credentials are configured, authentication happens automatically (no dialog)

sentences.en: If credentials are configured, authentication happens automatically (no dialog)
sentences.zh: 如果配置了凭据，则会自动进行身份验证（无对话框）

blocks.html_en: • If credentials are empty and proxy requires auth, interactive dialog will appear

sentences.en: If credentials are empty and proxy requires auth, interactive dialog will appear
sentences.zh: 如果凭据为空并且代理需要身份验证，则会出现交互式对话框

sentences.en: Examples:
sentences.zh: 示例：

sentences.en: SOCKS5 proxy (no auth): proxy_server=socks5://127.0.0.1:1080
sentences.zh: SOCKS5 代理（无身份验证）： proxy_server=socks5://127.0.0.1:1080

sentences.en: HTTP proxy: proxy_server=http://proxy.example.com:8080
sentences.zh: HTTP代理：proxy_server=http://proxy.example.com:8080

sentences.en: HTTPS proxy: proxy_server=https://secure-proxy.example.com:443
sentences.zh: HTTPS 代理： proxy_server=https://secure-proxy.example.com:443

sentences.en: Corporate proxy: proxy_server=http://proxy.corp.local:3128
sentences.zh: 公司代理：proxy_server=http://proxy.corp.local:3128

blocks.html_en: Note: Set proxy_enabled=false or leave proxy_server empty to disable proxy.

sentences.en: Note: Set proxy_enabled=false or leave proxy_server empty to disable proxy.
sentences.zh: 注意：设置 proxy_enabled=false 或将 proxy_server 留空以禁用代理。

sentences.en: Graphics Protocols#
sentences.zh: 图形协议#

blocks.html_en: Brow6el supports both Sixel and Kitty graphics protocols with automatic terminal detection.

sentences.en: Brow6el supports both Sixel and Kitty graphics protocols with automatic terminal detection.
sentences.zh: Brow6el 支持 Sixel 和 Kitty 图形协议，并具有自动终端检测功能。

sentences.en: Sixel Protocol (recommended):
sentences.zh: Sixel 协议（推荐）：

sentences.en: Default and most widely supported
sentences.zh: 默认且最广泛支持的

sentences.en: Supports both tiled and monolithic rendering
sentences.zh: 支持平铺和整体渲染

sentences.en: Tiled rendering reduces flicker significantly
sentences.zh: 平铺渲染显着减少闪烁

sentences.en: Generally faster for typing-heavy workflows
sentences.zh: 对于打字繁重的工作流程来说通常更快

blocks.html_en: • Supported terminals: mlterm, xterm, wezterm, foot, etc.

sentences.en: Supported terminals: mlterm, xterm, wezterm, foot, etc.
sentences.zh: 支持的终端：mlterm、xterm、wezterm、foot 等。

sentences.en: Kitty Protocol:
sentences.zh: 凯蒂协议：

sentences.en: Alternative graphics protocol for Kitty-compatible terminals
sentences.zh: Kitty 兼容终端的替代图形协议

sentences.en: Always uses monolithic rendering (entire screen redrawn)
sentences.zh: 始终使用整体渲染（整个屏幕重绘）

sentences.en: Double buffering prevents flicker
sentences.zh: 双缓冲防止闪烁

blocks.html_en: • 30 FPS frame rate for smooth animations

sentences.en: 30 FPS frame rate for smooth animations
sentences.zh: 30 FPS 帧速率，实现流畅的动画

sentences.en: Supported terminals: kitty, ghostty, wezterm, etc.
sentences.zh: 支持的终端：kitty、ghostty、wezterm 等。

sentences.en: Configuration (~/.brow6el/browser.conf):
sentences.zh: 配置（~/.brow6el/browser.conf）：

sentences.en: Runtime Controls:
sentences.zh: 运行时控制：

blocks.html_en: • Press z (in STANDARD mode) to toggle tiled/monolithic rendering (Sixel only)

sentences.en: Press z (in STANDARD mode) to toggle tiled/monolithic rendering (Sixel only)
sentences.zh: 按 z（在标准模式下）切换平铺/整体渲染（仅限 Sixel）

blocks.html_en: • Press Z (in STANDARD mode) to force full redraw

sentences.en: Press Z (in STANDARD mode) to force full redraw
sentences.zh: 按 Z（在标准模式下）强制完全重画

blocks.html_en: • Current mode shown in status bar: [S][T] (Sixel tiled), [S][M] (Sixel monolithic), [S] (Kitty)

sentences.en: Current mode shown in status bar: [S][T] (Sixel tiled), [S][M] (Sixel monolithic), [S] (Kitty)
sentences.zh: 状态栏中显示的当前模式：[S][T]（Sixel 平铺）、[S][M]（Sixel 单片）、[S]（Kitty）

sentences.en: How It Works:
sentences.zh: 运作原理：

sentences.en: Sixel Tiled Rendering:
sentences.zh: Sixel 平铺渲染：

blocks.html_en: • Tiles dynamically sized based on terminal resolution (~30-40 tiles per screen)

sentences.en: Tiles dynamically sized based on terminal resolution (~30-40 tiles per screen)
sentences.zh: 根据终端分辨率动态调整图块大小（每个屏幕约 30-40 个图块）

sentences.en: CEF dirty rectangles indicate changed regions
sentences.zh: CEF脏矩形表示发生变化的区域

blocks.html_en: • Only tiles intersecting dirty regions are redrawn

sentences.en: Only tiles intersecting dirty regions are redrawn
sentences.zh: 仅重绘与脏区域相交的图块

blocks.html_en: • Tiles aligned to terminal cell boundaries for artifact-free rendering

sentences.en: Tiles aligned to terminal cell boundaries for artifact-free rendering
sentences.zh: 与终端单元边界对齐的图块以实现无伪影渲染

sentences.en: Kitty Monolithic Rendering:
sentences.zh: Kitty 整体渲染：

blocks.html_en: • Entire screen encoded as RGBA and transmitted via base64

sentences.en: Entire screen encoded as RGBA and transmitted via base64
sentences.zh: 整个屏幕编码为RGBA并通过base64传输

sentences.en: Double buffering (alternating image IDs) prevents flicker
sentences.zh: 双缓冲（交替图像 ID）可防止闪烁

sentences.en: Uncompressed for optimal typing performance
sentences.zh: 未压缩以获得最佳打字性能

blocks.html_en: • Images placed below text layer (z=-1) so dialogs appear on top

sentences.en: Images placed below text layer (z=-1) so dialogs appear on top
sentences.zh: 图像放置在文本层 (z=-1) 下方，因此对话框显示在顶部

sentences.en: Zoom Control#
sentences.zh: 变焦控制#

blocks.html_en: Brow6el provides intelligent zoom control with three modes and per-site customization.

sentences.en: Brow6el provides intelligent zoom control with three modes and per-site customization.
sentences.zh: Brow6el 提供具有三种模式和每个站点自定义的智能缩放控制。

sentences.en: Keyboard Controls (STANDARD mode):
sentences.zh: 键盘控制（标准模式）：

sentences.en: + or = - Zoom in
sentences.zh: + 或 = - 放大

sentences.en: - or _ - Zoom out
sentences.zh: - 或 _ - 缩小

sentences.en: 0 - Reset zoom to 1.0x
sentences.zh: 0 - 将缩放重置为 1.0x

sentences.en: Zoom Modes:
sentences.zh: 变焦模式：

sentences.en: Auto Mode (default_zoom_behavior=auto):
sentences.zh: 自动模式（default_zoom_behavior=auto）：

blocks.html_en:
• Automatically calculates optimal zoom based on:
    • Terminal cell size (DPI adaptation) - 60% weight
    • Window resolution - 40% weight

sentences.en: Automatically calculates optimal zoom based on: Terminal cell size (DPI adaptation) - 60% weight Window resolution - 40% weight
sentences.zh: 自动计算最佳缩放基于： 终端单元尺寸（DPI 自适应） - 60% 权重 窗口分辨率 - 40% 权重

sentences.en: Terminal cell size (DPI adaptation) - 60% weight
sentences.zh: 终端单元尺寸（DPI 适配）- 60% 重量

sentences.en: Window resolution - 40% weight
sentences.zh: 窗口分辨率 - 40% 权重

blocks.html_en: • Larger windows get bigger text, smaller windows get compact text

sentences.en: Larger windows get bigger text, smaller windows get compact text
sentences.zh: 较大的窗口会显示较大的文本，较小的窗口会显示紧凑的文本

blocks.html_en: • Adapts to high-DPI displays and large fonts

sentences.en: Adapts to high-DPI displays and large fonts
sentences.zh: 适应高 DPI 显示器和大字体

sentences.en: Recalculates on window resize
sentences.zh: 重新计算窗口大小

sentences.en: Range: 0.5x to 3.0x
sentences.zh: 范围：0.5x 至 3.0x

sentences.en: Fixed Mode (default_zoom_behavior=fixed):
sentences.zh: 固定模式（default_zoom_behavior=fixed）：

sentences.en: Uses zoom level from zoom_level setting
sentences.zh: 使用 Zoom_level 设置中的缩放级别

sentences.en: Consistent zoom across all pages
sentences.zh: 所有页面的缩放一致

blocks.html_en: • Ideal for high-DPI displays that need constant scaling

sentences.en: Ideal for high-DPI displays that need constant scaling
sentences.zh: 非常适合需要持续缩放的高 DPI 显示器

sentences.en: None Mode (default_zoom_behavior=none):
sentences.zh: 无模式（default_zoom_behavior=none）：

sentences.en: Starts at 1.0x zoom
sentences.zh: 从 1.0 倍变焦开始

sentences.en: Manual control only via keyboard shortcuts
sentences.zh: 仅通过键盘快捷键手动控制

sentences.en: No automatic adjustments
sentences.zh: 没有自动调整

sentences.en: Per-Site Zoom:
sentences.zh: 每个站点的缩放：

blocks.html_en: Create ~/.brow6el/zoom.conf for site-specific zoom levels that override auto/fixed modes:

sentences.en: Create ~/.brow6el/zoom.conf for site-specific zoom levels that override auto/fixed modes:
sentences.zh: 为覆盖自动/固定模式的站点特定缩放级别创建 ~/.brow6el/zoom.conf：

sentences.en: Site-specific zoom works with subdomains (e.g., github.com matches www.github.com).
sentences.zh: 站点特定缩放适用于子域（例如，github.com 与 www.github.com 匹配）。

sentences.en: Configuration (~/.brow6el/browser.conf):
sentences.zh: 配置（~/.brow6el/browser.conf）：

sentences.en: Auto Zoom Formula:
sentences.zh: 自动缩放公式：

sentences.en: Reference: 1600x900 resolution, 10x20 pixel cells
sentences.zh: 参考：1600x900 分辨率，10x20 像素单元

sentences.en: Cell zoom = (cell_height/20 × 0.7) + (cell_width/10 × 0.3)
sentences.zh: 单元格缩放 = (单元格高度/20 × 0.7) + (单元格宽度/10 × 0.3)

sentences.en: Resolution zoom = (window_height/900 × 0.5) + (window_width/1600 × 0.5)
sentences.zh: 分辨率缩放 = (window_height/900 × 0.5) + (window_width/1600 × 0.5)

sentences.en: Final zoom = (cell_zoom × 0.6) + (resolution_zoom × 0.4)
sentences.zh: 最终缩放 = (cell_zoom × 0.6) + (resolution_zoom × 0.4)

blocks.html_en: This ensures text is readable on both high-DPI laptops and large desktop monitors.

sentences.en: This ensures text is readable on both high-DPI laptops and large desktop monitors.
sentences.zh: 这确保了文本在高 DPI 笔记本电脑和大型台式显示器上都可读。

sentences.en: JavaScript Console#
sentences.zh: JavaScript 控制台#

blocks.html_en: • Press c (in STANDARD mode) to open/close the console

sentences.en: Press c (in STANDARD mode) to open/close the console
sentences.zh: 按 c（在标准模式下）打开/关闭控制台

blocks.html_en: • Type JavaScript and press Enter to execute

sentences.en: Type JavaScript and press Enter to execute
sentences.zh: 输入 JavaScript 并按 Enter 执行

sentences.en: Scroll through output with ↑/↓
sentences.zh: 使用 ↑/↓ 滚动浏览输出

sentences.en: All console.log/warn/error messages are captured
sentences.zh: 捕获所有 console.log/warn/error 消息

sentences.zh: CEF 配置#

sentences.en: Brow6el uses a configuration file for Chromium command-line flags.
sentences.zh: Brow6el 使用 Chromium 命令行标志的配置文件。

sentences.en: Configure rendering options
sentences.zh: 配置渲染选项

sentences.en: Adjust logging verbosity
sentences.zh: 调整日志记录详细程度

sentences.en: Set custom user agent
sentences.zh: 设置自定义用户代理

sentences.en: And more!
sentences.zh: 还有更多！

sentences.en: Edit the config:
sentences.zh: 编辑配置：

blocks.html_en: Changes take effect on next browser start. See the config file for available options and documentation links.

sentences.en: Changes take effect on next browser start.
sentences.zh: 更改将在浏览器下次启动时生效。

sentences.en: See the config file for available options and documentation links.
sentences.zh: 请参阅配置文件以获取可用选项和文档链接。

sentences.en: Privacy & Data#
sentences.zh: 隐私和数据#

sentences.en: What persists:
sentences.zh: 持续存在的是什么：

sentences.en: Bookmarks (~/.brow6el/bookmarks)
sentences.zh: 书签（~/.brow6el/bookmarks）

sentences.zh: 用户脚本（~/.brow6el/userscripts/）

sentences.zh: 用户脚本配置（~/.brow6el/userscripts.conf）

sentences.en: CEF flags config (~/.brow6el/cef_flags.conf)
sentences.zh: CEF 标志配置 (~/.brow6el/cef_flags.conf)

blocks.html_en: What doesn't persist (default temporary mode, persists in persistent mode):

sentences.en: What doesn't persist (default temporary mode, persists in persistent mode):
sentences.zh: 什么不持久（默认临时模式，以持久模式持久）：

sentences.en: Cookies (cleared on exit)
sentences.zh: Cookie（退出时清除）

sentences.en: localStorage (cleared on exit)
sentences.zh: localStorage（退出时清除）

sentences.en: Cache (cleared on exit)
sentences.zh: 缓存（退出时清除）

sentences.en: History (not stored)
sentences.zh: 历史记录（未存储）

blocks.html_en: Each browser instance uses an isolated cache directory /tmp/brow6el_<PID> that is automatically deleted when you close the browser.

sentences.en: Each browser instance uses an isolated cache directory /tmp/brow6el_<PID> that is automatically deleted when you close the browser.
sentences.zh: 每个浏览器实例都使用一个独立的缓存目录 /tmp/brow6el_<PID>，当您关闭浏览器时该目录会自动删除。

sentences.en: Multiple Instances#
sentences.zh: 多个实例#

blocks.html_en: You can run multiple browser instances simultaneously:

sentences.en: You can run multiple browser instances simultaneously:
sentences.zh: 您可以同时运行多个浏览器实例：

sentences.en: Requirements#
sentences.zh: 要求＃

blocks.html_en: Graphics-capable terminal: Terminal emulator supporting Sixel or Kitty graphics protocols:

sentences.en: Graphics-capable terminal: Terminal emulator supporting Sixel or Kitty graphics protocols:
sentences.zh: 具有图形功能的终端：支持 Sixel 或 Kitty 图形协议的终端仿真器：

blocks.html_en: • Sixel (recommended): mlterm, xterm, foot, wezterm, yaft, etc.

sentences.en: Sixel (recommended): mlterm, xterm, foot, wezterm, yaft, etc.
sentences.zh: Sixel（推荐）：mlterm、xterm、foot、wezterm、yaft 等。

sentences.en: Kitty: kitty, ghostty, wezterm, etc.
sentences.zh: Kitty：kitty、ghostty、wezterm 等。

blocks.html_en: The browser automatically detects graphics support - no manual configuration needed. If both protocols are supported, Sixel is preferred by default.

sentences.en: The browser automatically detects graphics support - no manual configuration needed.
sentences.zh: 浏览器自动检测图形支持 - 无需手动配置。

sentences.en: If both protocols are supported, Sixel is preferred by default.
sentences.zh: 如果两种协议都支持，则默认首选 Sixel。

sentences.en: Build Dependencies:
sentences.zh: 构建依赖关系：

sentences.en: Runtime Dependencies (automatically satisfied on most systems):
sentences.zh: 运行时依赖项（在大多数系统上自动满足）：

blocks.html_en: • libsixel, X11 libraries, NSS/NSPR (SSL), GLib, D-Bus, ALSA, Pango, Cairo

sentences.en: libsixel, X11 libraries, NSS/NSPR (SSL), GLib, D-Bus, ALSA, Pango, Cairo
sentences.zh: libsixel、X11 库、NSS/NSPR (SSL)、GLib、D-Bus、ALSA、Pango、Cairo

sentences.en: How It Works#
sentences.zh: 它是如何运作的#

blocks.html_en: CEF renders web pages offscreen → Graphics conversion (Sixel or Kitty protocol) → Output to terminal

sentences.en: CEF renders web pages offscreen → Graphics conversion (Sixel or Kitty protocol) → Output to terminal
sentences.zh: CEF 离屏渲染网页 → 图形转换（Sixel 或 Kitty 协议） → 输出到终端

blocks.html_en:
Sixel pipeline: CEF BGRA buffer → libsixel conversion → Sixel escape sequences
Kitty pipeline: CEF BGRA buffer → RGBA conversion → base64 encoding → Kitty escape sequences
